title: geum portenschlagianum
intro: Geum portenschlagianum, also known as the Fringed Avens or Alpine Avens, is a flowering plant species in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Geum portenschlagianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the roots being the primary source of medicinal compounds.
